name: SilverStone SETA D1 Mid-Tower Computer Case - Supports up to SSI-EEB Motherboards - 6x 3.5" HDD Slots - 2x 140mm Front Fans - 1x 140mm Rear Fan - 1x USB Type-C - 2x USB 3.0 - 1x Combo Audio (SED1-B)
shortName: SilverStone SETA D1 Mid-Tower Computer Case - Supports up to SSI-EEB
description: Mid-tower case supporting SSI-EEB motherboards with 6 HDD slots and 140mm fans for storage-intensive server or workstation builds.
